name: Mathematik I
content: Mathematik I — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 8 LP. Linear algebra and analysis foundations.

name: Mathematik II
content: Mathematik II — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 8 LP. Calculus, series, differential equations.

name: Mathematik III
content: Mathematik III — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 8 LP. Advanced engineering mathematics.

name: Technische Mechanik I (Stereostatik)
content: Technische Mechanik I (Stereostatik) — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Statics of rigid bodies, forces, equilibrium.

name: Technische Mechanik II (Elastostatik)
content: Technische Mechanik II (Elastostatik) — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Stress, strain, deformation of elastic bodies.

name: Technische Mechanik III (Dynamik)
content: Technische Mechanik III (Dynamik) — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Kinematics and dynamics of bodies.

name: Technische Thermodynamik I
content: Technische Thermodynamik I — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Energy, first/second law, state changes.

name: Technische Thermodynamik II
content: Technische Thermodynamik II — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Cycles, mixtures, heat transfer basics.

name: Grundlagen der Konstruktionslehre
content: Grundlagen der Konstruktionslehre — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Fundamentals of engineering design.

name: Vertiefte Konstruktionslehre
content: Vertiefte Konstruktionslehre — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Advanced machine design and components.

name: Konstruktionslehre Gestalten
content: Konstruktionslehre Gestalten — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Embodiment design, CAD, technical drawing.

name: Fertigungstechnik
content: Fertigungstechnik — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Manufacturing processes and production engineering.

name: Grundlagen der Werkstoffwissenschaften
content: Grundlagen der Werkstoffwissenschaften — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Materials science: structure, properties, behaviour.

name: Grundlagen der Elektrotechnik
content: Grundlagen der Elektrotechnik — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Electrical engineering fundamentals for mechanical engineers.

name: Informatik für Ingenieure - Einführung & Überblick
content: Informatik für Ingenieure — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Programming and computer-science basics for engineers.

name: Teamprojekt MB
content: Teamprojekt MB — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Team engineering project applying core skills.

name: Nichttechnische Angebote im Bachelor
content: Nichttechnische Angebote im Bachelor — TUHH Maschinenbau (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Non-technical electives: self-management, teamwork, communication.
